content.query:
ALTER VIEW [dbo].[Quotation-advanced find-BI (GM)]
AS
 SELECT 
 opportunity.utc_packageid AS 'Package ID (Package) (Package)',
utc_quotation.utc_totalamountn AS 'Total Amount',
 DATEADD(HOUR,8, utc_quotation.createdon) AS 'Created On',
 DATEADD(HOUR,8, utc_quotation.modifiedon) AS 'Modified On',
utc_quotation.utc_quotationid AS 'Quotation ID',
utc_quotation.utc_quoteid AS 'Quote ID',
utc_quotation.utc_contractid AS 'Contract ID',
(SELECT LocalizedLabel FROM dataverse_carrierchina_caschinaprd.[dbo].[OptionSetMetadata]
WHERE OptionSetName ='utc_approvalstatus' 
AND LocalizedLabelLanguageCode ='1033' AND [Option] = utc_quotation.utc_approvalstatus
) AS 'Approval Status',
 utc_quotation.utc_rppmarginrate AS 'RPP Margin%',
(SELECT name FROM dataverse_carrierchina_caschinaprd.DBO.account_partitioned WHERE id = utc_quotation.utc_accountoncreation) 
AS 'Account On Creation',
utc_quotation.utc_versionno AS 'Version No',
(
SELECT LocalizedLabel FROM dataverse_carrierchina_caschinaprd.DBO.[GlobalOptionSetMetadata] 
WHERE OptionSetName LIKE 'utc_quotationstatus'AND LocalizedLabelLanguageCode ='1033' AND [option] =utc_quotation.utc_quotationstatus 
) AS 'Quotation Status',
 DATEADD(HOUR,8, utc_quotation.utc_choppeddatetime) AS 'Chopped Date', 
DATEADD(HOUR,8, utc_quotation.utc_downpaymentreceiveddatetime) AS 'Down Payment Received Date',
DATEADD(HOUR,8, utc_quotation.utc_contracteffectivedate ) AS 'Order Date',
 utc_quotation.utc_vattaxrate AS 'VAT Tax Rate',
 (SELECT utc_chinesename FROM dataverse_carrierchina_caschinaprd.DBO.utc_accounttype_partitioned WHERE id = utc_quotation.utc_accounttypeoncreation) AS 'Account Type on creation', 
 DATEADD(HOUR,8, utc_quotation.utc_pricingapproveddatetime) AS 'Pricing Approved Date',
(
SELECT LocalizedLabel FROM dataverse_carrierchina_caschinaprd.[dbo].[OptionSetMetadata]
WHERE OptionSetName ='utc_company' 
AND LocalizedLabelLanguageCode ='1033' AND [Option] = utc_quotation.utc_company
) AS 'Company',
utc_quotation.utc_costcentre AS 'Cost Centre',
(
SELECT LocalizedLabel FROM dataverse_carrierchina_caschinaprd.DBO.[OptionSetMetadata]
WHERE OptionSetName LIKE '%utc_downpaymenttype%' 
AND LocalizedLabelLanguageCode ='1033'
AND EntityName = 'opportunity' AND [Option] = utc_quotation.utc_downpaymenttype
) AS 'Down Payment Type',
utc_quotation.utc_ifbid AS 'If Bid',
utc_quotation.utc_ifchopped AS 'If Chopped',
utc_quotation.utc_ifdownpaymentreceived AS 'If Down Payment Received',
utc_quotation.utc_ifstandardlegalterm AS 'If standard Legal Term',
opportunity.[name]AS 'Package',
systemuser.employeeid AS 'Owner Code',
systemuser.fullname AS 'Owner',
(
SELECT LocalizedLabel FROM dataverse_carrierchina_caschinaprd.DBO.[OptionSetMetadata]
WHERE OptionSetName LIKE '%utc_ifstandardpaymentterm%' 
AND LocalizedLabelLanguageCode ='1033'
AND EntityName = 'utc_quotation' AND [option]=utc_quotation.utc_ifstandardpaymentterm
) AS 'Payment Term Type',
utc_project.[utc_projectno] AS 'Project Code',
utc_project.[utc_projectname] AS 'Project Name',
utc_quotation.utc_sapareacode AS 'SAP Area Code',
utc_quotation.utc_sapbranchcode AS 'SAP Branch Code',
utc_quotation.utc_sapsonumber AS 'SAP SO Number',
utc_quotation.utc_greenchannel AS 'Green Channel',
utc_quotation.utc_keyaccountstockdealeragreement AS 'Key Account/Stock Dealer Agreement',
utc_quotation.utc_mspmarginrate AS 'MSP Margin%',
utc_quotation.utc_standardcost AS 'Standard Cost %',
utc_quotation.utc_tpmarginrate AS 'TP Margin%',
utc_quotation.utc_package,
utc_quotation.ownerid,
utc_quotation.utc_migrated_rppmarginrate 'migrated rppmargin', --20201106 add utc_migrated_rppmargin,
(SELECT utc_caserpid FROM dataverse_carrierchina_caschinaprd.DBO.account_partitioned WHERE id = utc_quotation.utc_accountoncreation) 
AS 'Account Code' 
FROM
 dataverse_carrierchina_caschinaprd.DBO.utc_quotation_partitioned utc_quotation
 JOIN dataverse_carrierchina_caschinaprd.DBO.opportunity_partitioned opportunity
 ON opportunity.opportunityid = utc_quotation.utc_package 
 LEFT JOIN dataverse_carrierchina_caschinaprd.DBO.systemuser_partitioned systemuser
 ON utc_quotation.ownerid = systemuser.Id
 LEFT JOIN dataverse_carrierchina_caschinaprd.DBO.utc_project_partitioned utc_project
 ON utc_quotation.utc_projectname = utc_project.Id
WHERE ISNULL(utc_quotation.carcgl_applicationregion,'') <> 2 --2 for HK
GO
